name: Apple Something
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Prepared Instant Vanilla Pudding Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dough according to your bread machine's instructions.
2. For the filling, mix together half a cup of melted butter or margarine (or one-fourth cup), four ounces of cream cheese (such as Neufchatel), and one tablespoon of sugar.
3. Stir in 3 tablespoons of cinnamon, along with raisins and nuts if desired.
4. Add one-half teaspoon of vanilla extract to the cream cheese mixture, then gradually mix in two cups of powdered sugar until smooth. Finally, add a few teaspoons of milk to achieve your desired consistency.
The recipe has been successfully tested using both full-fat and reduced-fat cream cheese, with reduced-fat options yielding similar results. Fat-free cream cheeses were not used as they did not produce satisfactory outcomes.
